positive: A set of three simple, cute, and charming illustrations of anthropomorphic woodland creatures (bear, rabbit, owl) engaged in daily activities. The style is clean, flat vector illustration with thick outlines and a cheerful, pastel color palette. Perfect for children's apparel or stickers.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, complex shading, oil paint, realism
